_about: Story audience reference data (Phase 39). Maps an audience key to a human label and the complexity instruction passed into the AI prompts. Read via story_audiences() (db_functions.php). Fallback for unknown keys: middle_grade.

picture_book.label: Picture book
picture_book.complexity: Very simple words, 1-2 sentences per scene, concrete imagery only

early_readers.label: Early readers (6-9)
early_readers.complexity: Simple vocabulary, short sentences, relatable characters
